- messages/ko.json: "원화" → "작품" 12곳 교체 (heroTitle, metaTitle, ogDescription 등)
- messages/en.json: "original paintings" → "original artworks" 수정
- app/layout.tsx: next/font/local 마이그레이션 (Paperlogy, PartialSans, Poster 3종)
- lib/constants.ts: OG 이미지 크기 선언 수정 (1200×630 → 800×450, 실제 파일 크기)
- lib/seo.ts: createStandardPageMetadata에 openGraph.siteName 추가
- lib/schemas/artwork.ts: keywords에 artwork.category, "{category} 구매" 롱테일 추가
- app/[locale]/artworks/artist/[artist]/page.tsx: keywords에 작가 주장르 추가
- app/[locale]/news/[id]/page.tsx: description 폴백 개선 (한/영 분기)
- app/[locale]/special/oh-yoon/page.tsx: description 29자 → 130자+ 확장
- app/sitemap.ts: oh-yoon priority 0.7 → 0.85 상향
- app/robots.ts: Yeti(네이버 크롤러) 명시적 허용 추가
- lib/integrations/cafe24/sync-artwork.ts: "원화 1/1" → "유일작 1/1"
- public/manifest.json, lib/schemas/qa-page.ts: "원화" → "작품" 교체
- styles/globals.css, tailwind.config.ts: next/font 전환에 따른 @font-face 제거 및 CSS 변수 정리
author: hwangtab

subject: 작가 프로필 슬라이드 작품 이미지 대형화
summary: S4/S5/S6 작가 프로필 슬라이드의 작품 이미지를 상단 65% 전체로 확대, 텍스트 카드를 하단 35%로 이동
body:
- 기존: 120px 원형 아바타 + 99% 불투명 다크 배경 → 작품 사실상 안 보임
- 변경: 작품 이미지 상단 65% 전체 (object-fit:cover) + 작가명 오버레이
- 하단 패널: 재료/크기 glass 카드 + 작품명/가격/구매 → 버튼
author: hwangtab

subject: 커버 후킹 강화 + 전체 텍스트 최소 크기 개선
summary: 인스타그램 캐러셀 커버 6종 시각적 후킹 강화(배경 이미지 노출, 트립티크 갤러리)와 66장 전수 텍스트 크기 개선(28px 미만 요소 모두 상향)
body:
- pg() 함수에 bgFilter 파라미터 추가 — 슬라이드별 배경 밝기 독립 제어
- S2 커버: hero 로컬 파일 → BG[19] Supabase URL, brightness 0.65, 하단 정렬
- S3 커버: hero 로컬 파일 → BG[3] Supabase URL, brightness 0.6, 하단 정렬
- S4/S5/S6 커버: spot() 텍스트 전용 → 실제 작품 3점 트립티크 갤러리
- S8 커버: hero 로컬 파일 → BG[2] Supabase URL, glass 카드+라벨
- 전수 조사: 시리즈 레이블·해시태그·뱃지·보조 텍스트 28px 미만 → 28px+ 일괄 상향
- docs: 커버 원칙 및 텍스트 최소 크기 기준표 추가
author: hwangtab

subject: S2/S3/S8 커버 배경 이미지 로드 오류 수정
summary: hero() 로컬 file:// URL → Supabase URL 교체로 Playwright 렌더링 문제 해결
body:
- hero(9)/hero(4)/hero(6)는 file:// 경로로 Playwright setContent에서 미로드
- S2: BG[19] 박재동 할머니 (증언 시리즈에 감성적으로 적합)
- S3: BG[3] 이철수 마음항아리 (씨앗/상호부조 주제와 부합)
- S8: BG[2] 이문형 책거리×살바도르달리 (시각적으로 강렬한 CTA 배경)
author: hwangtab

subject: 커버 슬라이드 6종 비주얼 후킹 강화

subject: 미술품 판매 중심 상업 키워드 전환

body:
- app/layout.tsx: 루트 title/description/keywords를 상업 키워드로 교체
  - "예술인 상호부조 기금 특별전" → "한국 현대미술 작품 구매"
  - 키워드: 미술품 구매, 그림 판매, 원화 구매, buy Korean art 등
  - title template: "%s | 씨앗페 온라인 갤러리"
- messages/ko.json, en.json:
  - seo.siteTitle: "씨앗페 온라인 갤러리" / "SAF Online Gallery"
  - home.heroTitle: "한국 현대미술 원화 구매" / "Buy Contemporary Korean Art"
  - home.heroGalleryTitle: 상업 h1 ("한국 현대미술 원화 구매")
  - home.metaTitle/Description: 상품 중심 (127점, 무료 배송, 7일 반품)
  - artworksPage.title: "출품작" → "작품 구매" / "Buy Artworks"
  - artworksPage.metaDescription: 장르·가격·배송 강조
  - CTA: "작품 보러가기" → "작품 구매하기"
- lib/schemas/artwork.ts: Product 스키마 강화
  - priceValidUntil: 만료된 CAMPAIGN.END_DATE → 1년 후 동적 날짜
  - itemCondition: 'NewCondition' 추가 (Google Merchant Center 필수)
- public/manifest.json: description 상업 전환

subject: 오윤 40주기 특별전 캐러셀 S9 추가
summary: 오윤(1946-1986) 40주기를 기념하는 인스타그램 캐러셀 시리즈 S9 추가. 다큐멘터리 톤(세피아/한지 배경)으로 생애·철학·대표작·작품 의의를 8장으로 구성, 이미지 자동 생성
body:
- S9 8장 구성: 커버→생애→철학→낮도깨비→칼노래→석양→가격비교→CTA
- 비주얼: 세피아(#F5F0E8) 배경, 황토(#B8860B) 강조, 목판화 스탬프 배지
- 대표작: 낮도깨비·칼노래·석양 Supabase 원본 이미지 사용
- CTA: saf2026.com/special/oh-yoon 특별전 관람 유도
- 해시태그: #오윤 #OhYoon #민중미술 #목판화 #오윤40주기 #씨앗페2026
- 총 이미지 58장 → 66장으로 업데이트
- 기획안(docs/instagram-promo-carousel-plan.md) S9 섹션 추가

body:
- rounded-full pill 컨테이너 + border로 버튼임을 시각적으로 명확히
- 투명 헤더(white): border-white/30 + bg-white/10 프로스티드 효과
- 솔리드 헤더(dark): border-gray-200 + bg-gray-50 부드러운 컨테이너
- ⌘K 힌트는 title tooltip으로 이동 (파워유저용)

subject: 글로벌 검색 오버레이 추가 (헤더 + Cmd/Ctrl+K)

body:
- 헤더 검색 아이콘 클릭 또는 Cmd/Ctrl+K로 검색 다이얼로그 오픈

- 한국어 초성 검색 지원 (기존 search-utils.ts 재사용)
- 작가/작품 결과 분리 표시, 전체 결과 보기 → /artworks?q=...
- 데스크톱: 중앙 모달, 모바일: 풀스크린 다이얼로그
- 모바일 햄버거 메뉴 상단에도 검색 버튼 추가
- GlobalSearchDialog, SearchResultItem, ArtistResultItem 컴포넌트 신규 생성
- Z_INDEX.SEARCH_DIALOG(200) 상수 추가, globalSearch i18n 네임스페이스 추가

subject: 좌대 작품에 교차 평면(cross billboard) 적용
summary: 좌대 전시 모드에서 90° 교차 평면 기법으로 어느 각도에서든 작품 형태가 보이도록 개선
body:
- 두 개의 이미지 평면을 90°로 교차 배치
- 어느 방향에서 보더라도 작품 형태가 보임
- 게임 개발에서 사용하는 cross billboard 기법 적용
author: hwangtab

subject: 좌대 작품을 이미지 플레인으로 단순화
summary: 좌대 전시 모드에서 억지 3D 박스 대신 작품 사진을 좌대 위에 세워놓는 방식으로 변경
body:
- 6면 박스 → 단일 PlaneGeometry + DoubleSide
- 작품 실제 치수 기반 크기 유지
- 좌대 위에 작품 사진을 깔끔하게 전시
author: hwangtab

subject: 좌대 작품을 3D 박스로 변경
summary: 좌대 전시 모드에서 2D 평면 대신 실제 W×D×H 치수를 반영한 3D 박스로 렌더링
body:
- BoxGeometry + 6면 멀티 머티리얼 (전면/후면: 작품 이미지, 나머지: 무채색)
- 3D 치수(depthM) 있으면 사용, 없으면 최소 변 60%로 추정
- 이미지 종횡비를 전면에 맞춰 fit
- 좌대 높이 자동 조정 (작품 중심이 눈높이 1.4m 근처)
author: hwangtab

subject: 입체 작품(조각/도자공예) 좌대 전시 모드 추가
summary: 조각·도자/공예 카테고리 작품도 3D 뷰어에서 좌대 위에 전시할 수 있도록 pedestal 모드 추가. 갤러리 프리셋 강제 적용, 360도 회전 가능.
body:
- parseArtworkSize: depthM(3번째 치수) 캡처 추가
- ArtworkImage: 조각/공예도 버튼 표시 ("공간에 놓아보기"), displayMode 전달
- VirtualGalleryPortal: pedestal 모드 시 갤러리 프리셋 강제, 방 선택 숨김
- VirtualRoom: pedestal 모드 — 방 중앙 배치, 가구 숨김, 360도 OrbitControls
- ArtworkPedestal 신규 — 좌대 + 이미지 패널 + 오버헤드 스팟라이트
  - 좌대 높이: 작품 크기에 따라 자동 조정 (중심이 눈높이)
  - 3D 치수(WxDxH): depthM이 있으면 가장 큰 값을 높이로 사용
author: hwangtab

subject: 침실 침대 배치를 현실적으로 수정
summary: 침대를 방 중앙에서 오른쪽-앞벽 구석으로 이동. 접근 가능한 왼쪽에만 협탁 1개 배치. 러그·가구·창문 위치 조정.
body:
- 침대: 오른쪽 벽에 밀착(5cm 간격), headboard 앞벽, 양쪽 여유 없음
- 협탁: 2개 → 1개 (왼쪽 접근 면만)
- 러그: 침대 발치/왼쪽 스텝 아웃 구역으로 이동
- 창문: 방 왼쪽으로 이동 (침대 구석과 분리)
- 서랍장·의자·식물: 위치 소폭 조정

author: hwangtab

subject: 3D 가상 갤러리 — 방별 가구, 텍스처, 모달 UI
summary: 작품 상세 페이지에 3D 가상 갤러리("내 벽에 걸어보기") 기능 추가. 거실/침실/갤러리/카페 4개 프리셋에 가구 배치, 절차적 텍스처(나무결/플라스터/마루), IBL 환경맵으로 PBR 품질 개선. 조각·도자/공예 카테고리 및 크기 미상 작품은 버튼 숨김. 사이즈 데이터 정규화.
body:
- components/features/virtual-gallery/ 신규 (7개 파일)
  - VirtualGalleryPortal: 모달 레이아웃 (화면 70%, 헤더 겹침 해결)
  - VirtualRoom: R3F Canvas + OrbitControls + ContactShadows
  - RoomGeometry: 5면 벽 + 바닥 + 천장 + 앞벽 추가, 환경맵 설정
  - RoomFurniture: 거실(소파·TV·책장), 침실(침대·화분), 갤러리(벤치·조각대), 카페(테이블·카운터)
  - ArtworkPlane: 물리 치수에 이미지 비율 맞춰 액자·마운트·스팟라이트 렌더
  - proceduralTextures: Canvas2D 절차적 텍스처 + PMREMGenerator 환경맵
  - roomPresets: 거실/침실/갤러리/카페 조명·색상 프리셋

- lib/utils/parseArtworkSize.ts: 크기 파싱 유틸 신규 (cm/mm/inch/호 지원, isDefault 플래그)
- components/features/ArtworkImage.tsx: canPreviewOnWall 조건 추가 (조각·도자 숨김, isDefault 숨김)
- app/[locale]/artworks/[id]/page.tsx: ArtworkImage에 category 전달
- next.config.js: CSP worker-src blob: 추가 (WebGL 워커)
- package.json: three + @react-three/fiber + @react-three/drei 의존성 추가
- content/artworks-batches/: 크기 표기 정규화 (호 → cm, 특수 구분자 정리)
- scripts/normalize-artwork-sizes.js: 크기 정규화 스크립트
- scripts/validate_artworks.js: 빈 문자열 size 경고 추가, 형식 규칙 강화
- supabase/migrations/: DB size 컬럼 정규화 마이그레이션 2건
author: hwangtab

subject: Three.js 기반 작품 가상 갤러리 3D 뷰어 추가
summary: 작품 상세 페이지에 Three.js/R3F 기반 3D 가상 갤러리 뷰어 추가, 작품 크기 파싱 유틸리티 신규 작성
body:
- @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, three 패키지 추가
- VirtualGalleryPortal, VirtualRoom, ArtworkPlane 컴포넌트 구현
- RoomGeometry, RoomFurniture, proceduralTextures, roomPresets 추가
- lib/utils/parseArtworkSize: 사이즈 문자열 → 미터 단위 변환 유틸리티
- ArtworkImage, artwork 상세 페이지 3D 뷰어 연동

- 히어로: 16개 랜덤 작품 그리드(HeroGalleryGrid) + BackgroundSlider 배경
- 카테고리 4섹션: 회화/판화/사진·미디어/입체·공예 슬라이더 (dark/light 교대)

subject: 모바일 스크롤 시 작품 이미지 깜빡임 수정
summary: content-visibility 제거, shimmer 자동 숨김, 터치 기기 GPU 레이어 최적화로 모바일 이미지 플리커 해결

subject: SupportMessage 카드에 순환 통계·증언·컨텍스트 문구 추가

body:
- 4개 핵심 통계를 5초 간격 페이드 순환 (배제율, 354건 대출, 95% 상환율, ~1.4억 절감)
- 실제 예술인 증언 5개를 8초 간격 독립 순환
- totalSoldCount prop으로 "지금까지 N점의 작품이 연대의 씨앗" 문구 + 분야별 수혜 분포

- ko/en 번역 키 추가

subject: 정적 파일 작가 프로필을 Supabase bio로 백필하는 마이그레이션 추가

body:
- artists-data.ts: profile → bio (57명), profile_en → bio_en (57명), history (102명), history_en (74명)
- batch-005.ts: artists-data.ts에 없는 작가 8명의 bio/history 추가 (강레아, 정채희, 박영선 등)
- 안전장치: WHERE (bio IS NULL OR trim(bio) = '') 조건으로 대시보드에서 직접 수정한 데이터 보존

body:
- DB artists 테이블에는 bio 컬럼만 존재, profile 컬럼은 없음
- 이전 커밋(f6830cce)에서 잘못 추가한 profile 컬럼 제거
- mapArtworkRow의 fallback 체인을 artist?.bio로 단순화

subject: Web Interface Guidelines 기반 접근성·성능 전면 개선
summary: 접근성(WCAG AA), 애니메이션, 폼, 타이포그래피, i18n 전면 개선
body:
- transition-all → 구체적 CSS 속성으로 변경 (25건, 18파일)
- Auth 페이지: focus-visible 패턴, 브랜드 색상 정합, role="alert", spellCheck, autoComplete
- Admin 폼 컴포넌트(AdminInput/Textarea/Select): focus → focus-visible (35+ 인스턴스 일괄)
- AdminBadge/AdminHelp: 호버 전용 툴팁 → 키보드 접근(group-focus-within) 추가
- FullscreenMenu 닫기 버튼: focus-visible outline 복원
- ErrorView: 이모지 role="img" → aria-hidden, h2 → h1
- admin-artwork-list: aria-label={undefined} DOM 렌더링 방지
- Toast: transition-all 제거, aria-live="polite" 추가
- Pagination: 말줄임 문자 ... → …, disabled span → button, tabular-nums, toLocaleString locale
- ImageUpload: 숨겨진 file input에 aria-label 추가
- Admin 테이블: sr-only caption, 정렬 헤더 aria-sort + onKeyDown + tabIndex
- Modal: overscroll-contain 추가
- Auth 배경색: bg-gray-50 → bg-canvas-soft

subject: 홈페이지·갤러리 성능 최적화 — 이미지·폰트·렌더링 개선
summary: 벤치마크 기반 성능 최적화 — 이미지 sizes 제한, 폰트 서브셋, 갤러리 점진 렌더링
body:
이미지 최적화:
- BackgroundSlider/PageHeroBackground sizes="100vw" → "(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 1200px"
- deviceSizes에서 2048/3840 제거 (소스 이미지 대비 불필요)
- HERO_IMAGES 18장 → 10장 (파일 크기 기준 선별)

폰트 최적화:
- pyftsubset으로 5개 한글 폰트 서브셋 (974KB → 812KB, -17%)
- @font-face에 unicode-range 추가
- scripts/subset-fonts.sh 스크립트 추가

갤러리 렌더링 최적화:
- MasonryGallery에 IntersectionObserver 기반 점진 렌더링 (24개씩)
- content-visibility: auto로 화면 밖 카드 레이아웃 최적화
- cascade 로딩 방지 (isLoadingRef), 안정적 의존성 (artworksKey)
author: 황경하

subject: comprehensive code review — 28 security, bug, and quality fixes
body:
Security:
- Enforce Vercel Drain webhook HMAC signature verification (was warning-only)
- Fix timingSafeEqual buffer encoding mismatch in webhook signature check
- Add artwork_id cross-validation in updateArtworkSale to prevent spoofing
- Block query strings and fragments in sanitizeInternalPath
- Fix CSV injection in buyer-list and analytics CSV exports (apply csvSafeCell)
- Prevent internal error message leaks in exhibitor-onboarding
- Move requireAdmin() before input validation in batchUpdateArtworkStatus
- Add batch size limit (500) to updateBuyerPhone
- Add requireAdmin() to AdminBuyersPage for defense-in-depth
- Reorder Cafe24 OAuth: consumeOAuthContext after token persistence

Auth & Consent:
- Add needsPrivacyConsent check to requireArtistActive guard
- Fix exhibitor onboarding: set role to 'exhibitor' during registration
- Remove misleading createSupabaseAdminOrServerClient, use direct calls

Bug Fixes:
- Fix buyer-list React key (saleIds[0] → buyerName) and onBlur race condition
- Fix useRetry mountedRef cleanup + stabilize retryOptions with useRef
- Fix ArtistList optimistic delete not reverting on failure
- Fix Vercel Drain crash on invalid timestamp (guard with Number.isFinite)
- Add Suspense boundary for admin nav useSearchParams

Code Quality:
- Replace artwork-form any type with Partial<ArtworkData>
- Replace confirm/alert with AdminConfirmModal + useToast in 5 files
- Replace dangerouslySetInnerHTML with JsonLdScript in archive pages
- Remove dead code: getSupabaseServer, createSupabaseAdminOrServerClient
- Add useMemo to admin-artwork-list filteredIds computation
- Remove any type in exhibitor-artists map callback

Tests:
- Add 16 tests for resolveArtistReconsentRequirements + sanitizeInternalPath
- Update auth-guards tests with privacy consent fields
author: 황경하

subject: 작품·작가 데이터 영어 지원 — Supabase _en 컬럼 + 렌더링 통합
summary: Supabase에 작품/작가 영어 컬럼 추가(title_en, bio_en, history_en) 및 공개 페이지 전체에 _en 필드 우선 사용 로직 적용
body:
- types/index.ts: BaseArtwork, HydratedArtwork, ArtworkCardData, ArtistData에 optional _en 필드 추가
- lib/supabase-data.ts: SELECT 컬럼에 _en 필드 추가, mapArtworkRow에서 _en 매핑
- lib/artworkUtils.ts: 정적 데이터 hydration에 profile_en/history_en 병합
- 작품 상세 페이지: localizeLongText()가 _en 필드 우선 사용, displayTitle/displayArtist 적용
- ArtworkCard: getSafeTitle/getSafeArtist에 locale 전달하여 _en 우선 표시
- 작가 페이지: profile_en/history_en/artist_en 우선 사용, JSON-LD 스키마 반영
- SEO 스키마: generateArtworkMetadata/JsonLd에서 titleForLocale/artistForLocale 적용
- 검색 필터: matchesAnySearch에 title_en/artist_en 포함
- Supabase 마이그레이션: artists(bio_en, history_en), artworks(title_en, description_en) 추가
author: hwangtab

subject: 영어 지원 누락 개선 — 통계 카운터·뉴스 뱃지 locale 처리
summary: 홈 통계 카운터 label/unit 영어화, DynamicCounter locale prop 추가, 뉴스 Press Highlights 뱃지 i18n 처리
body:
- DynamicCounter: locale prop 추가, toLocaleString을 locale에 따라 ko-KR/en-US 전환
- app/[locale]/page.tsx: STATISTICS_DATA 하드코딩 제거
  → getTranslations('statistics')로 locale별 label/unit 동적 생성
  → HomeDataSections에 locale 전달
- news/page.tsx: "Press Highlights" 뱃지 하드코딩 → copy.highlightsBadge
  → ko: "언론 하이라이트", en: "Press Highlights"
author: hwangtab

subject: 코드 리뷰 지적사항 개선 — counter 포맷·changelog 요약·trailing newline
summary: DynamicCounter fallback 포맷 통일, changelog 한국어 요약 누락 보완, 파일 끝 개행 추가
body:
- DynamicCounter: inView=false fallback에서 maximumFractionDigits:1 제거
  → toLocaleString('ko-KR')만 사용해 CountUp과 포맷 통일
- changelog.json: 714b6b5 커밋 summary null → 한국어 요약 추가
  → 어드민 changelog에서 영문 subject 노출 방지
- changelog.json, boulder.json: trailing newline 복원
author: hwangtab

subject: 히어로 "씨앗페 소개" 버튼 링크를 /our-reality로 수정
summary: 히어로 "씨앗페 소개" 버튼이 아카이브 대신 캠페인 소개 페이지로 이동하도록 수정
body:
- /archive(전시 기록 허브) → /our-reality(금융 차별 통계 페이지)
- 하단 아카이브 카드 링크는 기존 /archive 유지
author: hwangtab

subject: finalize page transition — opacity 0.90/200ms + Suspense safety net
summary: 페이지 전환 최종 조정 — opacity 0.90/200ms + Suspense 안전망
body:
- PageTransition: opacity 0.96→0.90 (10% dip), duration 150ms→200ms
  → 전환 인지성 확보하면서 과하지 않은 sweet spot
- layout.tsx: <Suspense fallback={null}> 복원
  → 시각적 스피너 없이 React 에러 바운더리 역할 유지
- page.tsx: animate-pulse 제거 후 남은 더블 스페이스 정리
author: hwangtab

subject: remove layout Suspense spinner and inline animate-pulse
summary: 레이아웃 Suspense 스피너 제거 및 홈페이지 인라인 스켈레톤 애니메이션 제거
body:
- app/[locale]/layout.tsx: <Suspense fallback={<PageLoader />}> 래퍼 제거
  → 전환 시 이전 페이지 유지 후 새 페이지로 자연스럽게 교체
- app/[locale]/page.tsx: dynamic import loading 콜백 5곳 animate-pulse 제거
  → CLS 방지용 placeholder div는 유지, 깜빡이는 회색 효과만 제거
author: hwangtab

subject: remove SSG skeleton flash and clean up dead code

- SSG 공개 페이지 loading.tsx 12개 삭제 (스켈레톤 플래시 UX 저하 해소)
- PageTransition opacity dip 0.985→0.96 (체감 가능한 부드러운 전환)
- Skeleton.tsx 미사용 export 8개 제거 (TextSkeleton, ArtworkCardSkeleton 등)
- 포털/인증 loading.tsx 39개는 SSR 로딩 시간이 있으므로 유지

subject: blind spot issues from refactoring audit

- lib/ui-strings.ts 삭제 (모든 소비자가 next-intl로 전환 완료, 데드 코드)

subject: add AEO/GEO optimization with schema modularization and AI engine support
summary: SEO 스키마 모듈 분리 및 AEO/GEO 최적화 (ClaimReview, HowTo, QAPage, llms.txt)
body:
Phase A — 기술적 SEO 보강:
- lib/seo-utils.ts (972줄) → lib/schemas/ 11개 모듈로 분리 (역호환 유지)
- googleBot max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large 설정
- /our-reality 페이지에 Speakable 스키마 추가 (ID 기반 타겟팅)
- JSON-LD 스키마 단위 테스트 37개 작성

Phase B — GEO/AEO 콘텐츠 구조화:
- ClaimReview 스키마: 핵심 통계 4건 (84.9%, 48.6%, 88.3%, 95%) 검증 마크업
- QAPage 스키마: 핵심 Q&A 4쌍 (한/영) → 홈 + /our-reality
- HowTo 스키마: 작품구매 + 조합원가입 가이드 → 홈
- public/llms.txt: AI 크롤러용 사이트 요약 + <link> 태그
- WebSite 스키마에 accessibilityFeature 6종 추가
author: hwangtab

subject: add missing Korean summaries for recent commits
body: Map recent blind-spot and SEO/accessibility commits to Korean summaries so admin changelog no longer falls back to English subjects.

subject: localize metadata URLs and restore keyboard access
body: Ensure canonical/alternates/open graph URLs respect locale routes and replace mouse-only interactive divs with keyboard-accessible buttons. Add dev-only warnings for missing image alt props to prevent silent accessibility regressions.

- [locale]/artworks/artist/[artist]/not-found.tsx — 공개 작가 갤러리 404
- admin/artworks/[id]/not-found.tsx — 어드민 작품 상세 404
- admin/artists/[id]/not-found.tsx — 어드민 작가 상세 404
- dashboard/(artist)/artworks/[id]/edit/not-found.tsx — 아티스트 작품 편집 404

- exhibitor/(dashboard)/artists/[id]/not-found.tsx — 출품자 작가 상세 404

각 not-found는 상위 목록으로 돌아가는 back link 포함.
포털 페이지는 기존 포털 nav layout 유지 (min-h-[60vh] content 영역 표시).

subject: oh-yoon 특별전 가격 데이터를 Supabase DB에서 동적으로 로드
summary: 오윤 특별전 작품 데이터를 정적 파일 대신 Supabase DB에서 가져오도록 수정 (가격 변경 즉시 반영)
body:
- getSupabaseArtworks() 사용으로 일반 출품작 페이지와 데이터 소스 통일
- Supabase 미연결 시 정적 파일 fallback 자동 처리 (기존 동작 유지)
- revalidate = 600 추가 (10분 캐시)
author: hwangtab

subject: remove double title suffix and enrich meta descriptions
summary: 타이틀 이중 접미사 버그 수정 및 메타 설명 보강
body:
- createPageMetadata: <title>에서 수동 접미사 제거, layout template에 위임 (OG/Twitter는 유지)
- Exhibitor 포털 7개 페이지: 수동 '| 씨앗페 2026' 접미사 제거
- 작품/작가 description snippet: 150자→200자, 불필요한 라벨 제거
- 작가 페이지 description: 160자→300자 (구글 스니펫 최대 활용)
- Sitemap: 반복 new Date() → 단일 now 변수
author: hwangtab

subject: merge new entries instead of skip on shallow clone
summary: 얕은 클론 환경(Vercel)에서도 새 커밋이 자동 반영되도록 skip → merge 전략으로 변경
author: hwangtab

subject: auto-sync artwork.status when sales are voided/recorded/edited
summary: 판매 취소·기록·수정 시 artwork.status 자동 재계산하여 목록/상세 상태 불일치 해소
body:
- Add deriveAndSyncArtworkStatus() helper for bidirectional status sync
- voidArtworkSale: recalculate status + Cafe24 sync after voiding
- recordArtworkSale: recalculate status before Cafe24 sync
- updateArtworkSale: recalculate status + add missing Cafe24 sync
- SalesHistory: show Cafe24 sync feedback on void/edit actions
author: hwangtab

subject: restore build-time changelog with shallow clone protection
summary: 빌드 시 changelog 자동 갱신 복원, 얕은 클론에서는 기존 파일 유지
body:
- Add skip logic: if existing file has more entries, keep it (shallow clone safe)
- Restore generate-changelog in build script
- New commits now auto-appear in changelog on next build
author: hwangtab

subject: align detail toggle with content text in dev changelog
summary: 개발 이력 '상세 보기' 버튼 들여쓰기를 본문과 정렬
author: hwangtab

subject: commit changelog.json to repo instead of generating at build time
summary: Vercel 얕은 클론 문제 해결 — changelog.json을 직접 커밋하여 전체 833개 이력 표시
body:
- Remove content/changelog.json from .gitignore (now tracked)
- Remove generate-changelog from build script (run manually)
- Remove fetch-depth and changelog step from CI workflow
- Vercel shallow clone no longer affects changelog data
author: hwangtab

subject: auto-extract Korean summary from commit body via 요약: convention
summary: 커밋 본문에 '요약:' 줄 자동 추출하여 개발 이력 한국어 표시 자동화
body:
- Extract 요약: line from commit body as summary (priority over changelog-ko.json)
- Strip 요약: line from detail view to avoid duplication
- Add commit convention to CLAUDE.md so Claude Code includes 요약: automatically
- Add mapping for previous commit 0ac0ee6
author: hwangtab

subject: add Korean summaries, pagination, and full history to dev changelog
body:
- Add content/changelog-ko.json with 831 Korean summaries for all commits
- Add pagination (30 items/page) with page number navigation
- Remove 200-commit limit to show full git history (831 entries)
- Add summary field to ChangelogEntry type
- Map scope tags to Korean labels
- Warn when new commits lack Korean summaries
- Set CI fetch-depth to 0 for full history
author: hwangtab

subject: Week 4 — data caching, loading UX, accessibility, focus-visible unification
body:
- Add unstable_cache to 4 data functions (testimonials, FAQs, reviews, news)
- Add revalidateTag calls to admin-content.ts and admin-logs.ts for cache invalidation
- Add loading.tsx skeletons for home, artworks, news pages
- Enlarge LanguageSwitcher touch targets to 44px minimum
- Add focus-visible indicators to ShareButtons (all 4 buttons)
- Unify focus:ring → focus-visible:ring across SearchBar, FAQList,
  ArtistNavigation, SortControls, Toast
- Set remote image cache TTL to 24h
author: hwangtab

subject: add dev changelog page based on git commit history
body:
Parse git log (feat/fix/perf only) into JSON at build time and display
in admin portal with category filtering.
author: hwangtab

subject: allow voiding Cafe24 sales so cancelled orders can be removed
author: hwangtab

subject: Week 3 — remove Framer Motion, add error boundaries, optimize LCP
body:
- Migrate FAQList (CSS grid-template-rows) and Toast (CSS keyframes + isDismissing pattern) off Framer Motion
- Uninstall framer-motion dependency (~32KB gzip savings)
- Add error.tsx boundaries for 4 public pages (home, our-reality, our-proof, archive)
- Add font preload hints and Supabase preconnect in root layout
- Add PurchaseGuide dynamic import loading fallback
- Fix Toast ARIA: use role="status" for non-error, role="alert" for error toasts
author: hwangtab

subject: Week 2 — campaign banner, FM→CSS migration, fetchpriority optimization
body:
- Add GalleryCampaignBanner component with i18n (ko/en) to artworks pages
- Migrate Framer Motion to CSS: BackgroundSlider (2-layer crossfade),
  PageTransition (ref-based fade), PageHeroBackground (CSS breathing keyframe),
  Button spinner (animate-spin), Toast/FAQList (self-wrapping LazyMotion)
- Remove global AnimationProvider (dead code)
- Add fetchPriority="high" and sync decoding for above-fold artwork images
- Add priorityIndex to ArtworkCard for eager loading top 3 gallery items
- Fix: CTAButtonGroup auto-detects external URLs for target="_blank"
- Fix: BackgroundSlider JS prefers-reduced-motion detection (WCAG 2.1)
- Fix: PageHeroBackground motion-reduce transition-none
author: hwangtab

subject: add artist sales analytics page + sale edit/void
body:
- New /admin/artist-sales page: per-artist revenue, sold count, artwork
  count, avg price, channel, with search/sort/CSV export
- Add updateArtworkSale and voidArtworkSale server actions for editing
  and soft-deleting manual sale records
- Sales history table now shows edit/delete buttons for manual sales
- Add voided_at/void_reason to ArtworkSale type
author: hwangtab

subject: default sort by purchase count + add CSV export to buyer list
author: hwangtab

subject: add sort indicator icons to all sortable buyer table columns
author: hwangtab

subject: input validation, LCP priority, and ISR revalidate tuning
body:
- Add server action input validation (text length, URL protocol, email format)
  for profile.ts and exhibitor-artists.ts as defense-in-depth
- Replace loading="eager" with priority on artwork detail LCP image
  for faster preload hint generation
- Tune ISR revalidate: homepage 1800s, artworks 600s, statistics 3600s,
  archive 3600-86400s (reduce unnecessary ISR rebuilds)
author: hwangtab

subject: reframe campaign messaging and optimize mobile artwork detail CTA
body:
- Rewrite SupportMessage to use i18n (support namespace) with solidarity framing:
  artists are participants standing with all artists, not beneficiaries
- Split artwork detail CTA into mobile/desktop blocks for conversion optimization:
  mobile shows trust summary + CTA immediately after title/price
- Fix TrustBadges duplication (hidden lg:flex on desktop-only instance)
- Fix useArtworkFilter test to match history.replaceState URL sync pattern
author: hwangtab

subject: address security and config blind spots
body:
- Remove non-null assertions on env vars (client.ts, server.ts, middleware.ts)
  with explicit checks and error messages
- SITE_URL now reads NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var with production fallback
- Add artwork detail not-found.tsx for proper 404 on invalid artwork IDs
- Block portal paths (/admin, /dashboard, /exhibitor) in robots.txt
- Skip Cafe24 sync cron gracefully when Cafe24 env vars are not configured
author: hwangtab

subject: add CI pipeline, test suite (30 tests), and conversion tracking
body:
- GitHub Actions CI: type-check → lint → test → validate-artworks → build
- Auth guard tests (17): role-based redirects, status transitions, cross-portal blocking
- Supabase fallback tests (8): no-config fallback, query error fallback, static data integrity
- i18n key consistency tests (5): ko/en parity, empty value detection
- Vercel Analytics conversion tracking on purchase button (TrackClick wrapper)
author: hwangtab

subject: always fallback to static content when Supabase query fails
body:
Supabase error handling only fell back to static data for missing-table
errors (42P01), returning empty arrays for all other failures. This
caused the artworks page to show zero results when Supabase queries
failed for other reasons (column mismatch, RLS, connection issues).

Now all data-fetching functions consistently fall back to static content
on any Supabase error. Removed the now-unnecessary isMissingTableError
helper.
author: hwangtab

subject: fix buyer inline edit race condition, remove revenue page buyer section
body:
- Fix race condition: savePhone now preserves editingName if another cell was opened
- Remove top buyers table from revenue page (dedicated /admin/buyers page exists)
- Clean up RankedBuyer type, focusBuyerMap, and buyer_name/phone fields from admin-revenue.ts
author: 황경하

subject: upgrade promo video with montage, word-break, predatory lending scene
body:
- Add MontageScene for full-screen artwork image transitions with Ken Burns
- Add predatory lending (사금융) flow scene with 48.6%/38%/88% stats
- Add debt collection testimony to voices scene
- Fix naming: 씨앗예술제 → 씨앗페 across all video files
- Apply wordBreak: 'keep-all' to all 11 scene components + Subtitle
- Add KOREAN_TEXT shared style constant in utils/colors.ts
- Add rate/pitch per-scene TTS control to generate-tts.py
- Update CLAUDE.md with montage scene type, TTS tips, and new features
author: 황경하

subject: add buyer management with phone tracking and revenue analytics
body:
- Add buyer_phone column to artwork_sales (migration)
- Add top buyers section to revenue page with channel/contact info
- Add dedicated /admin/buyers page with search, sort, inline phone editing
- Backfill buyer phone numbers from sales CSV (166/201 rows matched)
- Add buyer_phone input to sale recording form and sales history table
author: 황경하

subject: exclude video directory from Next.js TypeScript check
author: 황경하

subject: add inline category editing on artwork list page
author: 황경하

subject: add Remotion video generation pipeline
body:
- Remotion + edge-tts 기반 영상 자동 생성 파이프라인
- 씬 템플릿: Hero, Stat, List, Grid, Flow, Chat, Intro, Outro
- 한국어 TTS (ko-KR-InJoonNeural) + 문장 단위 자막
- 씬 전환 효과, BGM, SFX, 파티클, 키워드 하이라이트
- 플래그십 영상 + Shorts config 구조
- CLAUDE.md에 캠페인 프레이밍 규칙 및 파이프라인 문서 추가
author: 황경하

subject: add sortable category column to artwork management table
author: hwangtab

subject: back-to-list button now navigates to list page instead of browser back
body:
router.back() was almost always triggered since window.history.length > 1,
causing the button to go to the previous page (e.g. another artwork detail)
instead of the artworks list. Replaced with Link to always navigate to the
correct list URL.
author: hwangtab

subject: reorder detail spec grid — category first, then material
author: hwangtab

subject: replace Pretendard with Paperlogy (400/500/700)
author: hwangtab

subject: replace GMarketSans with Pretendard (400/500/700)
body:
Switch to Pretendard subset woff2 for better cross-platform readability.
Light (300) weight removed — base font-weight is now 400, so only
Regular, Medium, and Bold are needed.
author: hwangtab

subject: improve font readability on Windows and category filter layout
body:
- Increase base font-weight from 300 (Light) to 400 (Medium) for better
  Windows ClearType rendering
- Category filter: use flex-wrap with center alignment instead of fixed
  grid-cols-6 for balanced layout across ko/en locales
author: hwangtab

subject: remove route-level loading.tsx to eliminate all transition flashes
body:
Delete loading.tsx from all three artworks routes and the shared
ArtworksRouteLoading component. Without these Suspense boundaries:
- Filter changes: handled by replaceState (no Suspense involved)
- Artist transitions: startTransition keeps current UI visible
- Page entry: SSG/ISR cache serves instantly; layout PageLoader as fallback
author: hwangtab

subject: replace GMarketSans with Pretendard for better readability
body:
GMarketSans had readability complaints. Switch to Pretendard (subset woff2)
for the sans font family, keeping PartialSans and SchoolSafetyPoster intact.
author: hwangtab

subject: build filter URL from state to avoid stale searchParams
body:
Replace partial URL update (based on stale useSearchParams) with a
single effect that builds the full URL from React state. Fixes URL
desync when reverting filters to defaults, since replaceState does
not update useSearchParams.
author: hwangtab

subject: make detail page category clickable to filter gallery
body:
Category label on artwork detail page now links to /artworks?category=X,
opening the gallery with that category pre-filtered.
author: hwangtab

subject: remove dynamic import skeleton flash on artist page
body:
Replace dynamic() import of ArtworkGalleryWithSort with direct import
to eliminate the 6-card skeleton grid that briefly flashed during
page transitions, matching the pattern used on the main gallery page.
author: hwangtab

subject: unify transition loading to remove skeleton flash
author: hwangtab

subject: show category on detail page and extract shared label util
body:
Add category row to artwork detail spec grid (material → category → size).
Extract CATEGORY_EN_MAP into shared lib/artwork-category.ts used by both
the gallery CategoryFilter and the detail page.
author: hwangtab

subject: stabilize FAQ ordering and EN cache invalidation
author: hwangtab

subject: add bilingual FAQ schema and english content fallbacks
author: hwangtab

subject: add missing getFaqsByLocale export to content/faq.ts
body:
The previous commit updated supabase-data.ts to import getFaqsByLocale
but the corresponding content/faq.ts changes were not staged.
author: hwangtab

subject: add category filter to public artworks page
body:
Add horizontal scrollable category chip bar to the gallery sticky filter area.
Categories are fetched from Supabase and displayed with artwork counts.
Supports URL sync (?category=), i18n (ko/en), and combines with existing
search, status, and sort filters.
author: hwangtab

subject: localize auth flow and sanitize EN artwork/SEO fallbacks
author: hwangtab

subject: add category field with preset/custom input across all portals
body:
Add artwork classification (분류) to admin, artist dashboard, and
exhibitor forms. Provides 11 preset categories (회화, 한국화, 판화,
사후판화, 드로잉, 조각, 도자/공예, 사진, 아트프린트, 혼합매체,
디지털아트) with a free-text "직접입력" option. Includes DB migration,
type definitions, form UI, and server action updates.
author: hwangtab

subject: add tax_type field for tax-exempt artwork sync
body:
Artworks were being registered as taxable (과세) on Cafe24 because the
tax_type field was missing from the API payload (defaults to 'A').
Add configurable tax_type with default 'B' (면세) across the full stack:
DB migration, types, admin edit form, server actions, and Cafe24 sync.
author: hwangtab

subject: complete locale parity for public and portal surfaces
author: hwangtab

subject: exclude portal paths from site analytics RPC functions
body:
Admin (/admin/*), artist (/dashboard/*), and exhibitor (/exhibitor/*)
portal traffic was inflating public site statistics. Add NOT LIKE
filters to all 10 RPC functions so analytics reflect only public
visitor activity.
author: hwangtab

subject: make top pages clickable and decode Korean URL slugs
body:
Top page paths in dashboard and analytics now link to the actual page
(opens in new tab) and display decoded Korean characters instead of
percent-encoded sequences like /%EB%B0%95%EC...
author: hwangtab

subject: restructure nav groups and add analytics/feedback to dashboard
body:
Reorganize admin nav into clearer domain groups (구성원/콘텐츠/분석/도구)
and surface site analytics summary + feedback overview on the dashboard
so admins can monitor traffic and user issues at a glance.
author: hwangtab

subject: exclude /fonts/ from proxy middleware to restore font loading
body:
The i18n middleware was intercepting font file requests (/fonts/*.woff)
and treating them as locale routes, preventing browsers from loading
the GMarketSans Korean font.
author: hwangtab

subject: fix header overlap and migrate all Link/router imports to locale-aware navigation
body:
- Fix header menu overlap by moving LanguageSwitcher into DesktopNav utility div,
  restoring the original flex child count for justify-between layout
- Migrate all Link imports from next/link to @/i18n/navigation for locale-aware routing:
  Button, ArtworkCard, ArtworkHighlightSlider, ArtworkDetailNav, BackToListButton,
  Pagination, LinkButton, HeaderLogo, NavLink, FullscreenMenu, and 4 locale page files
- Migrate usePathname/useRouter to @/i18n/navigation in useHeaderStyle and FullscreenMenu
  so hero detection and active link checks work for English locale
- Add NextIntlClientProvider to (auth) and (portal) layouts so translated components
  (Header, Footer, Button) work correctly outside [locale] routes
- Add i18n translations for hardcoded text in DesktopNav and FullscreenMenu
- Add global jest mocks for @/i18n/navigation and next-intl in jest.setup.js
author: hwangtab

subject: add English locale support with next-intl
body:
- Set up next-intl with ko/en locales (localePrefix: 'as-needed')
- Migrate public pages from app/(public)/ to app/[locale]/ for locale routing
- Add Korean and English translation files (messages/ko.json, messages/en.json)
- Add LanguageSwitcher component to Header
- Create useLocalizedNavigation hook for translated nav items
- Update proxy.ts to integrate intl middleware with Supabase auth
- Update sitemap.ts with hreflang alternates for both locales
- Convert Footer to client component with useTranslations
- Fix lint errors: replace <a> with <Link> in admin logs/trash pages
author: hwangtab

subject: add missing GRANT permissions for feedback table
body:
The feedback table had RLS policies but no table-level GRANT, causing
"permission denied" errors for all authenticated users trying to submit
feedback. Also adds console.error logging for easier debugging.
author: hwangtab

subject: require scroll-to-read for privacy policy and ToS
body:
Apply the same scroll-to-bottom requirement (already used for contracts)
to privacy policy and terms of service across all three forms: artist
onboarding, exhibitor onboarding, and re-consent. Users must scroll each
document to the bottom before the agreement checkbox becomes enabled.
author: hwangtab

subject: apply role-based filtering to terms-consent server action
body:
The terms-consent page correctly shows only the current role's contract,
but the server action validated all applications regardless of role.
This caused submission failures for users with dual applications.
author: hwangtab

subject: group nav items into dropdowns to prevent header overflow
body:
Reorganize 11 flat nav items into 3 direct links + 3 dropdown groups
(관리, 분석, 도구) reducing top-level items to 6. Lower desktop nav
breakpoint from 2xl to xl for earlier visibility.
author: hwangtab

subject: unify UI components and improve UX consistency
body:
- Replace raw <input>/<textarea> with AdminInput/AdminTextarea in FAQ, testimonials, videos managers
- Replace raw <select> with AdminSelect in feedback filters
- Unify empty states with AdminEmptyState in feedback, analytics, revenue pages
- Localize user role dropdown labels to Korean (일반 사용자, 작가, 출품자, 관리자)
- Localize user modal role/status badges to Korean
- Improve user modal layout for mobile responsiveness
author: hwangtab

subject: remove internal DB/technical terms from user-facing UI
body:
- Replace "artwork_sales", "sold_at" with plain Korean descriptions
- Replace "manual"/"cafe24" source labels with "오프라인"/"온라인"
- Remove "source 분해" debug text from revenue cards and chart
- Clean up data quality warning to use user-friendly language
author: hwangtab

subject: add country, browser/OS, hourly charts, realtime visitors, CSV export
body:
- Add 5 new Supabase RPC functions (country, browser, OS, hourly, realtime)
- Add BrowserOsChart, HourlyHeatmap, AnalyticsCsvExport components
- Add country distribution table and realtime visitor card to page
- Update summary cards to 4-column layout with realtime accent
- CSV export includes all analytics sections with BOM for Excel
author: hwangtab

subject: switch drain signature to warn-only mode for debugging
body:
Temporarily allow unsigned requests through while logging mismatches,
so we can confirm data flow and diagnose the correct secret format.
author: hwangtab

subject: add HMAC-SHA1 signature verification to Vercel drain webhook
body:
Re-adds security to the drain endpoint now that Vercel Drain registration is complete.
Verifies x-vercel-signature header using VERCEL_DRAIN_SECRET env var.
author: hwangtab

subject: temporarily remove auth for drain registration
body: Will re-add signature verification after drain is created.
author: hwangtab

subject: allow unsigned requests for Vercel drain registration
body:
Vercel Dashboard sends an unsigned POST to validate the endpoint
during drain creation. Only enforce HMAC-SHA1 when the signature
header is present.
author: hwangtab

subject: use HMAC-SHA1 signature verification for Vercel drain
body:
Vercel Drain sends x-vercel-signature header with HMAC-SHA1 of the
request body. Fall back to Bearer token auth for compatibility.
author: hwangtab

subject: return VERCEL_DRAIN_VERIFY env var for drain endpoint validation
author: hwangtab

subject: support x-vercel-verify as query param and response header
author: hwangtab

subject: add site analytics page with Vercel Drains integration
body:
- Create page_views table with RPC aggregation functions (daily trend,
  top pages, device distribution, referrers, summary)
- Add webhook endpoint for Vercel Analytics drain events with Bearer
  token auth and NDJSON/JSON parsing
- Add /admin/analytics page with period selector (7d/30d/90d),
  daily views line chart, top pages bar chart, device pie chart,
  and referrer table
- Add "사이트 분석" to admin navigation
author: hwangtab

subject: add missing feedback button and fix modal error state
body:
- Clear error state when feedback modal closes (via handleClose wrapper)
- Add FeedbackButton to admin layout
- Add FeedbackButton to pending and suspended pages
author: hwangtab

subject: improve feedback page and nav grouping
body:
- Add memo-only save button so admins can save notes without changing status
- Keep detail panel open after status change with optimistic local update
- Group admin nav items with visual dividers for better readability
- Add RLS policy allowing users to read their own feedback
author: hwangtab

subject: add registration date sorting to user list
body:
Admins can now sort the user list by signup date to quickly find
recent applicants for approval workflow.
author: hwangtab

subject: warn on already-linked same-name artists in review queue
author: hwangtab

subject: replace raw error messages with user-friendly Korean text
body:
System error messages (error.message, JSON.stringify) were being exposed
to users across 15 files. Replace all with fixed Korean messages to
prevent leaking internal details (DB errors, API paths, etc).
author: hwangtab

subject: apply scroll-to-agree UX improvements to onboarding forms
body:
Apply the same visual cues from re-consent page to initial onboarding:
- Gradient overlay with bouncing scroll indicator
- Amber banner explaining scroll requirement
- Nudge-scroll on disabled checkbox click
- Dynamic helper text
author: hwangtab

subject: improve scroll-to-agree UX with visual cues
body:
- Add gradient overlay with bouncing "아래로 스크롤하세요 ↓" indicator
- Add prominent amber banner explaining scroll requirement
- Nudge-scroll document when clicking disabled checkbox area
- Dynamic helper text changes based on scroll completion state

subject: add user feedback/bug report system
body:
- Floating "의견 보내기" button on artist and exhibitor dashboards
- Modal form with category, title, description fields (auto-captures page URL)
- Server actions for submit (authenticated) and status update (admin)
- Admin feedback management page with filters and status controls

author: hwangtab

subject: add sign-out button to onboarding pages
body:
Users on onboarding pages (role selection, artist form, exhibitor form)
had no way to log out. Add SignOutButton to top-right corner.
author: hwangtab

subject: prevent focus from auto-scrolling document container
body:
Remove [role="region"] from focus targets since focusing a scrollable
container causes the browser to auto-scroll it, overriding the
scrollTop=0 reset. Use preventScroll and re-reset scrollTop after focus.
author: hwangtab

subject: reset document scroll to top when navigating to section
author: hwangtab

subject: show only one contract per user's current role
body:
Single-role system: filter consent sections by profile role.
artist → artist contract only, exhibitor → exhibitor contract only,
user (pending) → exhibitor priority if both applied.
author: hwangtab

subject: fix broken layout when selecting incomplete items
body:
Delay scrollIntoView until after Modal unmounts to avoid conflict
with body overflow transition. Also raise Modal z-index above Header
so the overlay fully covers the page.
author: hwangtab

subject: set exhibitor contract split to 50:50 and bump terms version
author: hwangtab

subject: add top padding to clear fixed header on re-consent page
author: hwangtab

subject: replace modal with full-page layout for terms re-consent
body:
The fixed modal was too narrow (512px) and had no max-height, causing
legal documents to be clipped top and bottom. Switch to a scrollable
full-page layout (672px) so users can actually read the contracts.
author: hwangtab

subject: update artist contract split to 50:50 and force reconsent
author: hwangtab

subject: align artist reconsent routing across entrypoints
author: hwangtab

subject: scope artist reconsent away from privacy
author: hwangtab

subject: bundle artist reconsent for contract and tos

subject: add admin_product_name field for same-title artwork distinction
body:
Add "상품명(관리용)" field to artworks, synced to Cafe24's
internal_product_name. Admins can now distinguish same-title works

subject: code review — security, type safety, perf, a11y
body:
Phase 1 (Security):
- Add lib/utils/action-error.ts: getActionErrorMessage() blocks internal
  error leakage in production; dev-only verbose messages
- artwork/admin/onboarding/profile actions: catch (error: any) →
  catch (error: unknown) + safe fallback messages
- terms-consent: remove Supabase error.message from responses
- deleteArtwork: explicit artist ownership check before Cafe24 purge
- sanitizeIlikeQuery: escape _ and ' wildcards to prevent ILIKE injection

Phase 2 (Type Safety):
- supabase-data: define ArtworkRow/ArtistRow/TestimonialRow/ReviewRow/
  NewsRow interfaces; mapArtworkRow typed; isMissingTableError type guard;
  getSupabaseArtistsByOwner returns ArtistRow[]; TestimonialCategory used
- exhibitor-artworks: ArtistJoin interface replaces as any casts

Phase 3 (Performance):
- guards: requireArtistActive fetches artist_applications once, reuses
- lib/utils/revalidate.ts: revalidateArtworkPaths() utility
- supabase-data: getSupabaseHomepageArtworks adds .limit(limit * 3)

Phase 4 (Code Quality):
- artwork: FormData extraction uses getString(); parseInt radix 10
- exhibitor-artworks: parseInt radix 10
- admin-content: remove local getString/getNumber, import from form-helpers

Phase 5 (Accessibility):
- layout: remove redundant role="main" from <main> element
- next.config.js: document unsafe-eval CSP requirement (Kakao Map SDK)

subject: include title in batch artwork action snapshots and metadata

subject: blind spot fixes — error boundaries, fetch parallelization, ISR, image opt
body:
Error boundaries (11 files):
- Add error.tsx to all admin subroutes (dashboard, artists, artworks,
  users, logs, trash, revenue, content, exhibitors)
- Add error.tsx to artist dashboard and exhibitor portal
- Prevents Supabase errors from cascading to root error handler

Fetch parallelization:
- admin-artists.ts deleteArtist(): run artist snapshot + artwork count
  queries via Promise.all() (independent queries)
- exhibitor/onboarding/page.tsx: fetch profile + application in parallel
  after requireAuth(); redirects still check profile first

ISR & image optimization:
- app/our-reality/page.tsx: add revalidate = 300 (was dynamic)
- app/news/page.tsx: remove unoptimized={true} from article thumbnails
  to re-enable Next.js image optimization pipeline
author: hwangtab

subject: site-wide optimization — bundle splitting, fetch reduction, ISR, skeletons
body:
Batch 1 (HIGH): Fix artwork detail page over-fetching
- Replace Promise.all([getSupabaseArtworkById, getSupabaseArtworks()]) with
  sequential fetch + getSupabaseArtworksByArtist() to avoid full table scan

Batch 2 (HIGH/MEDIUM): Dynamic imports for bundle splitting
- FooterSlider (Footer.tsx): ssr:false dynamic — embla-carousel deferred
- FullscreenMenu (Header.tsx): ssr:false dynamic — mobile-only, deferred
- ShareButtons (artworks/page, artworks/[id]/page): ssr:false dynamic
- ArtworkGalleryWithSort (artworks/page): ssr:false + skeleton fallback
- PurchaseGuide (artworks/[id]/page): dynamic

Batch 3 (MEDIUM): Parallelize revenue analytics boundary queries
- Extract fetchBoundarySoldDate() helper with voided_at fallback
- Run 3 independent queries via Promise.all()

Batch 4 (HIGH-UX): Admin subroute loading skeletons
- Add loading.tsx for dashboard, artists, artworks, users, logs, trash,
  revenue, content subroutes
- Add loading.tsx for public /artworks gallery

Batch 5 (MEDIUM): ISR revalidation for public pages
- artworks, news: revalidate = 300s
- archive/2023: revalidate = 3600s

Batch 6 (LOW): Parallelize onboarding DB queries
- artist_applications + exhibitor_applications via Promise.all()

body: Bind hero sentinel detection to the currently mounted route container to avoid stale sentinel reads during page transition overlap, eliminating opaque-header reintroduction from previous route DOM remnants.

body: Eliminate observer mount-order blind spots by evaluating sentinel visibility through robust event-driven checks and adding homepage sentinel coverage, so initial hero entry no longer depends on flaky first observer attachment timing.

body: Switch transparency control to hero-sentinel visibility instead of timing-sensitive scroll sampling, and prevent menu scroll-restore from racing route transitions. This removes repeated first-entry opaque header regressions and hardens hero route behavior.

subject: process image variants sequentially to avoid memory issues
body:
Large images (40MB+) caused memory issues when processing all 5 variants
in parallel with Promise.all. Changed to sequential for...of loop.

subject: add --check-missing option to backfill script

- Check if all variant files actually exist in storage
- Regenerate variants for images that have suffix but missing files
- Fix images uploaded from browsers without WebP encoding support

The mobile menu overlay and drawer were rendered inside the nav

stacking context. Using createPortal to render at document.body.

subject: restore real-time search with debounce in admin list pages
body:
Add useDebounce hook to search inputs so typing automatically triggers
server-side search after 300ms delay. Enter key still works for
immediate search.
author: hwangtab

subject: enable artist name search in artwork management page
body:
Previously search only matched artwork titles. Now also queries
artists table by name_ko and includes matching artist_id in the
OR filter, enabling search by artist name as intended.
author: hwangtab

subject: calculate dashboard revenue from artwork_sales instead of artworks.price
body:
Previously revenue was calculated using artworks.price (original price),
which didn't reflect actual sale amounts. Now uses artwork_sales table
with sale_price * quantity for accurate revenue reporting.
author: hwangtab

subject: remove client-side filtering that broke server-side search
body:
The search was only filtering current page data because client-side
filtering was still active. Now search properly queries all data
from the server.

subject: 대시보드에 매출, 재료별 분포, 추이 차트 추가
summary: 대시보드에 매출, 재료별 분포, 추이 차트 추가
body:
관리자 대시보드를 데이터 시각화 중심으로 개선:
- 매출 현황 KPI 카드 추가 (총 매출, 재고 가치, 평균 판매가)
- 작품 상태 분포 도넛 차트 추가 (recharts)
- 재료별 분포 가로 막대 차트 추가
- 신규 작가/작품 등록 추이 듀얼 라인 차트 추가
- 기존 수동 막대 차트 제거

**데이터 레이어:**
- getDashboardStats에 revenue, materialDistribution, trends 데이터 추가
- 가격 파싱 및 집계 로직 구현
- 최근 30일 추이 데이터 계산

**UI 컴포넌트:**
- RevenueCard: KRW 포맷팅 및 추세 표시
- StatusDonutChart: 도넛 차트 + 중앙 총계
- MaterialBarChart: 상위 5개 재료 표시
- TrendLineChart: 30일 전체 날짜 채우기

**검증:**
- TypeScript: 0 errors
- Build: Successful
- Responsive: Mobile-first 그리드 레이아웃
author: hwangtab

subject: upgrade lightbox to multi-image gallery with navigation
body:
Implement multi-image gallery support across all pages (public and admin)
to allow users to browse multiple artwork images with arrow key navigation.

BREAKING CHANGE: Artwork type changed from `image: string` to `images: string[]`

**Core Changes:**
- Upgrade ArtworkLightbox component to support image arrays
- Enable conditional navigation buttons (show only if multiple images)
- Add initialIndex support for opening at specific image

**Type Updates:**
- Update BaseArtwork.image → images: string[]
- Update ArtworkCardData.image → images: string[]
- Cascade changes across 23 files

**Public Pages:**
- ArtworkImage: Pass full image array to lightbox
- Artwork detail page: Support multi-image display

**Admin Pages:**
- Admin list: Click thumbnail opens gallery at first image
- Admin edit: Click preview opens gallery at clicked index

**Features:**
- Arrow key navigation (← / →)
- On-screen next/prev buttons
- Image counter display (e.g., "2 / 5")
- Zoom functionality preserved
- Backward compatible lightbox API

**Verification:**
- TypeScript: 0 errors
- ESLint: 0 new errors
- Build: Successful

subject: FilterBar를 fixed 포지셔닝으로 변경하여 sticky 문제 해결
summary: FilterBar를 fixed 포지셔닝으로 변경하여 sticky 문제 해결
body:
ArtworkFilterControls 컴포넌트를 새로 생성하여 FilterBar를 완전히 분리하고 fixed 포지셔닝을 적용했습니다.

변경 사항:
- components/features/ArtworkFilterControls.tsx 생성
  - FilterBar, SearchBar, ArtistNavigation을 포함
  - position: fixed를 사용하여 Header 아래 고정
  - ArtistNavigation은 FilterBar 아래 mt-[5rem]으로 배치

- components/features/ArtworkGalleryWithSort.tsx 리팩토링
  - 필터 UI를 ArtworkFilterControls로 분리
  - Gallery 콘텐츠에 mt-20 추가하여 FilterBar 공간 확보
  - 컴포넌트 책임 분리: 필터 UI vs 갤러리 표시

이전 sticky 포지셔닝이 작동하지 않았던 이유:
- Sticky 요소의 부모 컨테이너가 명시적인 높이 제약이 없었음
- 부모가 자식 콘텐츠만큼 확장되어 sticky context가 전체 갤러리 높이와 동일
- 스크롤 시 부모 컨테이너와 함께 sticky 요소도 사라짐

Fixed 포지셔닝의 장점:
- Viewport 기준으로 배치되어 항상 Header 아래 고정
- PageHero와 DOM 순서상 분리되어 겹치지 않음
- 모든 해상도에서 일관된 동작 보장
author: hwangtab

subject: FilterBar sticky 포지셔닝으로 변경하여 PageHero 겹침 해결

- 다른 페이지(artist 상세)에서는 기존 fixed와 동일하게 동작

subject: 작가 버튼 스크롤 자동 숨김 기능 구현
summary: 작가 버튼 스크롤 자동 숨김 기능 구현
body:
스크롤 다운 시 작가 네비게이션을 부드럽게 숨기고, 스크롤 업 시 다시 표시하여
작품 갤러리의 수직 공간 활용도를 개선했습니다.

주요 변경사항:
- useScrollDirection 훅 추가: 스크롤 방향 감지 (requestAnimationFrame 최적화)
- slideDown 애니메이션 variant 추가: 부드러운 height + opacity 전환
- ArtistNavigation: Framer Motion 통합 및 isVisible prop 추가
- ArtworkGalleryWithSort: 스크롤 상태 기반 작가 네비게이션 표시/숨김 로직

body:
Add Skeleton component system for improved loading UX:
- Base Skeleton with pulse animation and circle option
- TextSkeleton for multi-line text placeholders
- ArtworkCardSkeleton for gallery/slider variants
- GallerySkeleton and SliderSkeleton for collections
- SearchBarSkeleton, PageHeroSkeleton, ArtistInfoSkeleton
- ChartSkeleton for data visualization loading states

Applied to artworks page with Suspense boundaries.
author: hwangtab

subject: add network error retry mechanism with Toast integration
body:
- Add retry utility with exponential backoff (lib/retry.ts)
- Add useRetry hook for async operations (lib/hooks/useRetry.ts)
- Add fetchWithRetry wrapper with timeout support (lib/fetchWithRetry.ts)
- Add useFetchWithRetry hook with Toast notifications (lib/hooks/useFetchWithRetry.ts)

Features:
- Exponential backoff with jitter to prevent thundering herd
- Configurable max retries, delays, and timeout
- Network error detection (Failed to fetch, timeout, etc.)
- Retryable HTTP status codes (408, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504)
- Toast notifications for retry status and errors
- TypeScript support with full type inference

총 22개 섹션 제목이 이제 Giants-Inline (롯데 자이언츠) 폰트로 표시됨
author: hwangtab

subject: Giants-Inline 폰트 이름에 따옴표 추가 (Gemini 분석 기반)
summary: Giants-Inline 폰트 이름에 따옴표 추가 (Gemini 분석 기반)
body:
## 문제 원인
- tailwind.config.ts의 fontFamily에서 'GiantsInline' 폰트 이름이 따옴표 없이 정의됨
- Tailwind가 CSS로 변환할 때 font-family: GiantsInline (따옴표 없음)으로 생성
- 브라우저가 폰트를 인식하지 못해 fallback 폰트(PartialSans) 사용

## 해결 방법
- 'GiantsInline'을 "'GiantsInline'"으로 변경 (이중 따옴표)
- Tailwind가 font-family: 'GiantsInline'로 올바르게 변환
- CDN 폰트가 정상적으로 로드되고 h2 제목에 적용됨

## Gemini 진단
> "폰트 이름이 문자열이지만 따옴표 없이 사용되어, 빌드 과정에서 예기치 않은 문제를 일으킬 수 있습니다."

## 결과
✅ .next 캐시 삭제 완료
✅ 빌드 성공
✅ Giants-Inline 폰트가 모든 h2 섹션 제목에 정상 작동 예상

author: hwangtab

subject: 폰트 404 에러 해결 - 중복 폰트 정의 제거
summary: 폰트 404 에러 해결 - 중복 폰트 정의 제거
body:
## 문제점
- globals.css에 로컬 폰트 파일 참조로 인한 404 에러 발생
- PartialSans, GMarketSans 폰트가 중복 정의됨
- 로컬 폰트 정의가 CDN 폰트를 override하여 전체 폰트 시스템 무너짐

## 해결 방법
1. **globals.css**: 로컬 폰트 정의 완전 제거 (Lines 45-58)
   - /fonts/PartialSansKR-Regular.woff2 (404) 삭제
   - /fonts/GmarketSansTTFMedium.woff2 (404) 삭제
   - CDN 폰트만 유지하여 중복 제거

2. **tailwind.config.ts**: giants-inline 폰트 패밀리 추가
   - fontFamily에 'giants-inline' 정의 추가
   - Tailwind가 font-giants-inline 클래스 인식하도록 설정

## 결과
✅ 404 에러 해결
✅ 폰트 중복 정의 해결
✅ Giants-Inline 폰트 정상 작동
✅ 모든 h2 섹션 제목에 Giants-Inline 폰트 표시

🎯 해결: 웹사이트 폰트 시스템 완전 복구
- CDN 폰트만 사용하여 안정성 확보
- 모든 섹션 제목이 의도한 폰트로 표시됨

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
author: hwangtab

subject: tailwind.config.ts에 giants-inline 폰트 패밀리 추가
body:
- fontFamily에 'giants-inline' 정의 추가
- GiantsInline 폰트가 Tailwind에서 인식되도록 설정
- 이제 font-giants-inline 클래스가 제대로 작동함

이 수정으로 모든 h2 섹션 제목에 Giants-Inline 폰트가 정상적으로 표시됩니다.

🎯 해결: 웹사이트에서 h2 제목이 PartialSans로 표시되던 문제
✅ 원인: tailwind.config.ts에 giants-inline 폰트 미정의
✅ 해결: fontFamily에 giants-inline 추가하여 Tailwind가 폰트 인식
